summary: Blocks 5-8 testing completed successfully. Backend: 14/14 tests passed (100%). Frontend: 8/8 features verified (100%). All advisor assignment, notification, lead card, and customer context features are working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/advisors returns list with leads_count field
Backend: PUT /api/leads/{lead_id}/assign assigns advisor to lead
Backend: PUT /api/leads/{lead_id}/assign with empty advisor_id unassigns
Backend: GET /api/leads/{lead_id} includes _advisor_name when assigned
Backend: Role-based filtering - advisor only sees assigned leads
Backend: GET /api/chat/alerts returns list of alerts
Backend: GET /api/advisors/notifications returns list of notifications
Backend: PUT /api/advisors/notifications/{id}/read marks as read
Backend: PUT /api/advisors/notifications/read-all marks all as read
Backend: GET /api/leads returns leads with channel, source, city, product_interest
Backend: GET /api/leads?advisor={id} filters by advisor
Backend: GET /api/chat/lead-session/{lead_id} returns full lead context
Backend: GET /api/chat/lead-session/{lead_id} includes _advisor_name
Backend: Cleanup test data successful
Frontend: Notification bell visible in top bar on all pages
Frontend: Notification panel opens showing alerts and notifications
Frontend: Sound toggle button visible in notification panel
Frontend: Advisor filter dropdown visible for admin users on leads page
Frontend: Lead cards show colored tag badges (channel, source, city, product_interest, advisor)
Frontend: Lead detail dialog shows advisor assignment dropdown with advisors list
Frontend: Customer context card visible in chat page with Tel, Email, Ciudad, Fuente, Canal, Producto, Temporada, Asesor fields
Frontend: Role-based filtering - advisor only sees assigned leads (1 lead vs 35 for admin)
seed_data_creation: Advisor passwords updated to 'advisor123' during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Blocks 5-8 fully implemented and tested: 1) Block 5 - Advisor assignment dropdown in lead detail dialog allows admin to assign/unassign advisors to leads. Advisor badge (orange) shows on lead cards. Role-based filtering ensures advisors only see their assigned leads. 2) Block 6 - NotificationBell component visible in top bar across all pages with alert/notification panel and sound toggle. 3) Block 7 - Lead cards show colored tag badges for channel (emerald), source (blue), city (violet), product_interest (amber), and advisor (orange). Advisor filter dropdown visible for admin users. 4) Block 8 - Customer context card in ChatPage shows Tel, Email, Ciudad, Fuente, Canal, Producto, Temporada, and Asesor fields when a conversation is selected. All APIs working correctly with proper role-based access control.
blocks_5_8_completion_status: COMPLETE - All Block 5-8 features working correctly
